PatternLayout.pattern: %style{[}{#646464}%style{%d{ABSOLUTE}}{#46FF46}%style{]}{#646464} %style{[}{#646464}%highlight{%p{length=1}}{TRACE=#FF00FF, ALL=#D800D8, PRINT_STREAM=#D800D8, ERROR=#960000, INFO=#EADAE4, FATAL=#640000, DEBUG=#969696, OFF=#D800D8, WARN=#FFFF00}%style{]}{#646464} %style{[}{#646464}%style{%c{1.}}{#0064FF}%style{]}{#646464} %style{[}{#646464}%style{%t}{#C8C8C8}%style{]}{#646464}: %highlight{%m}{TRACE=#FF00FF, ALL=#D800D8, PRINT_STREAM=#D800D8, ERROR=#960000, INFO=#EADAE4, FATAL=#640000, DEBUG=#969696, OFF=#D800D8, WARN=#FFFF00}%n%highlight{%ex}{TRACE=#FF00FF, ALL=#D800D8, PRINT_STREAM=#D800D8, ERROR=#960000, INFO=#EADAE4, FATAL=#640000, DEBUG=#969696, OFF=#D800D8, WARN=#FFFF00}

%style{[}{#646464}%style{%d{ABSOLUTE}}{#46FF46}%style{]}{#646464} %style{[}{#646464}%style{STDOUT}{#AAAAAA}%style{]}{#646464} %style{[}{#646464}%style{%t}{#C8C8C8}%style{]}{#646464} %style{[}{#646464}%style{%location}{#969696}%style{]}{#646464} %style{%m}{#AAAAAA}%n%highlight{%ex}{TRACE=#FF00FF, ALL=#D800D8, PRINT_STREAM=#D800D8, ERROR=#960000, INFO=#EADAE4, FATAL=#640000, DEBUG=#969696, OFF=#D800D8, WARN=#FFFF00}
